message:
feat(tui): implement server-side compose dispatch via sync SQLite

Wire the ComposeEnvelope server control message to actually insert
the message into the database. Opens a one-shot sync SQLite connection,
resolves/auto-registers the HumanOverseer agent, inserts the message
with recipients, and pushes a MessageSent event to the TUI event ring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
